overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets and narrow alleys at night. The character moves from a busy commercial intersection through covered walkways and increasingly narrow passages, ending at a stairway in a tight service alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial intersection with vending machines

events.description: character crosses the street as vehicles pass by
entering covered walkway from open street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street at the intersection

entered.detail: green neon sign with arrow pointing right
blue and white food vending machine on the sidewalk
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisement
green metal railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk past a ramen shop and vending machine, then crosses the street as vehicles pass by. The scene is dominated by bright holographic billboards and green neon signage before entering a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: entering darker underpass area with steam vents
exiting underpass back to open street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway beneath the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera in the underpass

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the walkway
steam rising from ground vents in the underpass
electrical utility boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where steam rises from vents and the lighting becomes dimmer. The environment transitions from open street to sheltered passage before opening up again at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering narrow alley with Burrito shop neon sign
navigating through tighter passage with turns

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow neon-lit commercial alley

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: red neon sign reading BURRITOS above a shop entrance
blue neon sign with Japanese text HOテル
traditional red lanterns hanging above the alley
wooden tables and chairs outside a restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow commercial alley illuminated by vibrant neon signs including a red Burrito shop sign and a blue hotel sign with Japanese characters. The passage is tight with walls on both sides and features outdoor seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel courtyard with outdoor seating and service passages

events.description: entering hotel courtyard with 24-hour food stall
entering tighter service alley with air conditioning units

agents.ego_description: walking through the hotel courtyard and into narrower service passages

notable_agents.action: person standing near the food stall smoking

entered.detail: food stall with red neon sign reading 24時間営業
wooden dining tables with yellow umbrella shading
stacked air conditioning units mounted on the wall
metal roll-down shutters on closed shops

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small hotel courtyard featuring a 24-hour food stall with bright red neon signage and outdoor dining tables. The path continues into a tighter service alley lined with air conditioning units and closed metal shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight service alley leading to stairway exit

events.description: approaching and ascending concrete stairs at alley end

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrowest section of the alley and ascending the stairs at the end

notable_agents.action: person walking down the narrow passage toward camera

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading upward at the end of the alley
vertical red neon light strip on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates the tightest section of the service alley, passing stacked crates and air conditioning units, before reaching a set of concrete stairs that lead upward, marking the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, neon-drenched commercial thoroughfare into the claustrophobic depths of a service alley. It begins on a vibrant sidewalk past a ramen shop and vending machines, moving through the glow of holographic billboards before crossing a busy street into a covered walkway. As the camera passes beneath a massive concrete overpass, the open city light fades into a dimmer, sheltered passage filled with rising steam. The scene then shifts into a narrow commercial alley illuminated by red and blue neon signs, passing through a small hotel courtyard with a food stall before the path tightens further. Finally, the camera navigates a cramped service corridor lined with air conditioning units and metal shutters, ending at a set of concrete stairs leading upward.
